display.purpose: KPI values and primary page titles.

body.purpose: Standard table rows, inputs, and general text.

label.purpose: Table headers, IDs, amounts, and critical dates.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Default ambient shadow for surface cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with tactile hover lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f766e, #14b8a6); color: #fff; padding: 0 16px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: all 0.15s ease; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(15,118,110,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(15,118,110,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Status Pill (Available)
components.description: Visual indicator for positive operational state.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid; white-space: nowrap; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-pill::before { content: ''; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; display: block; } .ds-pill-available { color: #059669; background: #ecfdf5; border-color: #a7f3d0; } .ds-pill-available::before { background: #059669; }

components.name: Data Card
components.description: Standard container for dashboards and tables.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.06); font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { padding: 18px 20px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px; font-size: 13px; color: #475569; }

narrative.overview: TransitOps is a crisp, high-density environment that prioritizes accurate data and expert confidence without clutter. The design philosophy centers on maximizing real-time operational control for fleet managers, providing them with the exact data they need, instantly, without unnecessary ornamentation. It explicitly rejects cluttered, outdated enterprise ERP aesthetics in favor of a modern, professional, and tactile experience.
keyCharacteristics: Practice what you preach: Data should be accurate and accessible.
Expert confidence: The tool empowers managers without getting in their way.
High density without clutter: Maximize information, minimize noise.

rules.name: The Status Clarity Rule
rules.body: Status colors (Green, Amber, Red) are reserved strictly for operational states (Available, On Trip, In Shop) and must never be used for brand decoration.

rules.name: The Tabular Data Rule
rules.body: All IDs, financial amounts, and critical dates must use the JetBrains Mono font to ensure perfect vertical alignment in dense tables.

dos: Do use JetBrains Mono for IDs, amounts, and dates to align data vertically.
Do use the Flat-By-Default shadow strategy; reserve heavy shadows for modals or dropdowns.
Do maintain high density without clutter by using consistent padding (e.g., 20px inside cards).
donts: Don't design a cluttered, outdated enterprise ERP from 2005. Keep it crisp.
Don't use status colors (Green/Amber/Red) for decorative purposes.
Don't use large, sweeping gradients outside of the primary button or logo mark.
